説明文: When it shares the infinite energy it creates, that being’s entire body will be overflowing with power.
入手方法: プレミアムミッション: May 2026 Login Bonus (Day 1)

特性.効果: Once during your turn, after you flip any coins for an attack of 1 of yourPokémon, you may ignore all results of those coin flips and begin flipping those coins again. You can’t use more than 1 Victory Star Ability each turn.
